rationale: This statute concerns the status of a school district bond program and state debt obligations. It does not address residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values, so no conflict exists with the proposed increase.
quote: This subchapter does not create a debt of the state under the Texas Constitution or, except to the extent provided by this subchapter, create a payment obligation.
_note: Educ. Code §45.307 addresses program status and state debt for a school district bond credit enhancement subchapter; it is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No textual conflict identified.
